question_zh: 统计每个城市客户的订单总金额，按总金额从高到低排序。
schema_text: TABLE customers(customer_id, customer_name, city, segment); TABLE orders(order_id, customer_id, product_id, order_date, quantity, amount); TABLE products(product_id, product_name, category, unit_price);
gold_sql: SELECT c.city, SUM(o.amount) AS total_amount FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.city ORDER BY total_amount DESC;

question_zh: 找出 2024-03 奖金最高的员工姓名和奖金。
schema_text: TABLE departments(department_id, department_name, city); TABLE employees(employee_id, employee_name, department_id, title, hire_date); TABLE salaries(employee_id, salary_month, base_salary, bonus);
gold_sql: SELECT e.employee_name, s.bonus FROM salaries AS s JOIN employees AS e ON s.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE s.salary_month = '2024-03' ORDER BY s.bonus DESC LIMIT 1;

question_zh: 查询 2024S 学期平均成绩最高的课程名称和平均分。
schema_text: TABLE students(student_id, student_name, grade, major); TABLE courses(course_id, course_name, credits, teacher_name); TABLE enrollments(enrollment_id, student_id, course_id, semester, score);
gold_sql: SELECT c.course_name, AVG(e.score) AS avg_score FROM enrollments AS e JOIN courses AS c ON e.course_id = c.course_id WHERE e.semester = '2024S' GROUP BY c.course_name ORDER BY avg_score DESC LIMIT 1;

question_zh: 统计每个商品类别的购买总金额，只返回总金额大于 500 的类别。
schema_text: TABLE users(user_id, user_name, city, vip_level); TABLE items(item_id, item_name, category, price); TABLE purchases(purchase_id, user_id, item_id, purchase_date, quantity, paid_amount);
gold_sql: SELECT i.category, SUM(p.paid_amount) AS total_paid FROM purchases AS p JOIN items AS i ON p.item_id = i.item_id GROUP BY i.category HAVING SUM(p.paid_amount) > 500 ORDER BY total_paid DESC;
